name: Baby Shrimp & Tarragon Mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the mustard, lemon juice, vinegar, and tarragon.
2. Blend in the mayonnaise.
3. Add the shrimp, then the sour cream.
4. Blend well until combined.
5. Cover and chill until ready to serve.
6. Makes about 2 1/2 cups of dip.
7. Suggested dippers: Butterflake Biscuit Chips, Cabbage, Chili Peppers, String Beans, Artichoke Leaves.
